---
title: "Teaching"
---

# Teaching

## Current and recent courses

| Course | Area |
|---|---|
| ECON2112 Health Economics and Finance | Health economics, healthcare financing, economic evaluation |
| ECON3111 Behavioural Economics | Behavioural decision making, biases, policy applications |
| ECON3011 Health Economics and Finance | Health economics and applied policy analysis |

## Teaching interests

- Health economics
- Behavioural economics
- Applied microeconometrics
- Discrete choice modelling
- Economic evaluation and decision analysis
